playbook.intent: Affiliate dashboard noise → monthly clean payouts and a message to top referrers.
playbook.scope: Monthly one-hour ritual: pull affiliate and referral stats, approve commissions, process payouts, and send a personal thank-you message to top referrers so the program compounds.

stage.name: Pull
stage.intent: All referral and affiliate stats in one table.

tasks.task: Flag anomalies (no signups but high traffic, etc.)

stage.decision-gate: Advance once stats reconcile against revenue.

stage.name: Pay

tasks.task: Trigger payouts via Stripe or bank
Log each payout in the runway calculator

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after all payouts are confirmed.

stage.name: Thank

tasks.task: Pick top 5 referrers by paid revenue driven
Send a personal message with stats

stage.decision-gate: Done once all 5 receive a personal note.

extra.value: [Designing the affiliate program from scratch, Negotiating with individual affiliates, Building dashboards — using existing data only]
[An affiliate or referral program live, 'A payout method (Stripe, PayPal, bank transfer)']
[Treating the playbook as a checklist instead of a decision tree, Skipping decision gates when intermediate progress feels good, Letting tools or platforms replace the founder's own judgement]

['Did each stage produce its named output or get explicitly skipped with a note?', 'Were decision gates respected or quietly bypassed?', 'Is the evidence trail strong enough to defend the verdict externally?']

{human: faion get-content affiliate-referral-check-and-payout --format md, agent: faion get-content affiliate-referral-check-and-payout --format context, json: faion get-content affiliate-referral-check-and-payout --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft from brainstorm-2026-05-17, persona P2 (indie hacker)'}]
